headline: Blackstone (BX) Sells Northern Virginia Data Centers In $3.5 Billion Digital Realty Deal
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) is exiting major Northern Virginia data center investments in a US$3.5b transaction with Digital Realty. The deal involves Blackstone selling significant data center stakes that were originally acquired within the past three years. Blackstone and Digital Realty plan to keep working together on new digital infrastructure projects in the U.S. and Europe. For investors watching Blackstone, this US$3.5b exit from Northern Virginia data centers highlights how the company is...
